instruction: Help me record the training results

command: DISPLAY=:1 gsettings set org.gnome.desktop.screensaver idle-activation-enabled false 2>/dev/null; DISPLAY=:1 gsettings set org.gnome.desktop.session idle-delay 0 2>/dev/null; DISPLAY=:1 xset s off 2>/dev/null; DISPLAY=:1 xset -dpms 2>/dev/null; true

python3 -c "
import openpyxl
wb = openpyxl.Workbook()
ws = wb.active
ws['A1'] = 'Course'
ws['B1'] = 'Participants'
ws['C1'] = 'Avg Score'
ws['D1'] = 'Pass Rate(%)'
ws['A2'] = 'Safety Standards'
ws['B2'] = 45
ws['C2'] = 88.5
ws['D2'] = 93
ws['A3'] = 'Product Knowledge'
ws['B3'] = 45
ws['C3'] = 79.2
ws['D3'] = 84
ws['A4'] = 'Sales Skills'
ws['B4'] = 38
ws['C4'] = 92.1
ws['D4'] = 97
wb.save('/home/user/Desktop/training_scores.xlsx')
"

phases.instruction: Help me record the training results
Find the course with the highest pass rate from /home/user/Desktop/training_scores.xlsx, append to /home/user/Desktop/training_summary.txt: 'Highest Pass Rate Course: Sales Skills (97%)', save
